attributes.name: [PostgreSQL OTel] Average query latency 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks the average query execution latency of PostgreSQL via OTel db.server.top_query events (pg_stat_statements), ensuring that 99.5% of 1-minute time intervals show average per-query execution time below 200 milliseconds over a rolling period of 30 days to maintain responsive database performance for applications.
